qualifiers.label: Ram 1500 Classic (leaf-spring rear suspension, carryover body)
Redesigned Ram 1500 (coil-spring rear suspension, DT body)

parts.description: 2016-2023 Toyota Tacoma 3.5L Street Series Cat-Back. Dual muffler, passenger-side exit, 4in polished tips. Moderate exterior, mild interior sound.
2016-2023 Toyota Tacoma 3.5L Street Series Cat-Back. Single muffler, passenger-side exit. Slightly more aggressive note than 19293.
2016-2023 Toyota Tacoma 3.5L Overland Series Cat-Back. High clearance design, ideal for lifted trucks. Off-road tuned.
2021-2026 Ford F-150 5.0L SPEQ Series Cat-Back. Single driver-side rear exit. Tuned for the Coyote V8.

2003-2024 Toyota 4Runner 4.0L Overland Series cat-back performance exhaust system. Mandrel-bent 2.5in stainless steel main piping with a single high-clearance, no-tip passenger-side rear exit designed to improve ground clearance and departure angles. Two mufflers (one straight-through, one tuned chamber).

2025-2026 Toyota 4Runner 2.4L Overland Series cat-back performance exhaust system. High-clearance design maintains ground clearance off-road; 2.5in mandrel-bent stainless piping, two straight-through mufflers, single driver-side rear exit.

2010-2024 Toyota 4Runner 4.0L Street Series cat-back performance exhaust system. Mandrel-bent 2.5in main piping, single 22in straight-through muffler, single 4in polished double-wall angle-cut tip, straight passenger-side rear exit.

2003-2009 Toyota 4Runner 4.0L V6 / 4.7L V8 Street Series cat-back performance exhaust system. Mandrel-bent 2.5in piping, single 22in straight-through muffler, dual 3.75in polished welded-on double-wall straight-cut tips, dual same-side exit behind passenger rear tire.

2022-2026 Toyota Tundra 3.4L V6 Overland Series cat-back performance exhaust system. Single tipless, high-tuck tailpipe exiting driver-side rear. 3in mandrel-bent stainless piping, two straight-through offset mufflers, No Drone Technology resonators.

2022-2026 Toyota Tundra 3.4L V6 Street Series cat-back performance exhaust system. Resonant, powerful engine tone. 3in mandrel-bent piping, single straight-through muffler, dual black-coated double-wall angle-cut tips, dual same-side exit behind driver rear tire.

2014-2019 Toyota Tundra 4.6L V8 / 2014-2021 Toyota Tundra 5.7L V8 Street Series cat-back performance exhaust system. Mandrel-bent 2.5in piping, single 22in straight-through muffler, dual 3.5in polished single-wall angle-cut welded-on tips, dual same-side exit behind passenger rear tire.

2000-2004 Toyota Tundra 3.4L V6 / 2000-2006 Toyota Tundra 4.7L V8 Street Series cat-back performance exhaust system. Mandrel-bent 2.5in main piping, single 22in straight-through muffler, single 3.5in polished welded-on single-wall angle-cut tip, single passenger-side rear exit.

MagnaFlow 2011-2016 Ford F-250/F-350 Super Duty 6.2L Street Series Cat-Back Performance Exhaust System. Mandrel bent 3.5in main piping, 1 straight-through muffler, single passenger side rear exit with 5in polished double-wall angle-cut rolled edge tip.

MagnaFlow 2017-2022 Ford F-250/F-350 Super Duty 6.2L Street Series Cat-Back Performance Exhaust System. Mandrel bent 3.5in main piping, 1 straight-through muffler, single passenger side rear exit with 5in polished welded-on double wall angle cut rolled edge tip.

MagnaFlow 2020-2026 Ford F-250/F-350 Super Duty 7.3L Street Series Cat-Back Performance Exhaust System. Fast-flowing mandrel bent 3.5in main piping, 2 straight-through mufflers, single passenger side rear exit with 5in polished welded-on double wall angle cut rolled edge tip.

MagnaFlow Black DPF Series DPF-Back Performance Exhaust System for 2011-2026 Ford F-250/F-350 Super Duty 6.7L Power Stroke diesel. Mandrel-bent 5in diameter main piping, high-temp black powder-coated finish, muffler-delete, single passenger-side rear exit with 6in black-coated stainless tip.

MagnaFlow Pro DPF Series DPF-Back Performance Exhaust System for Ford F-250/F-350 Super Duty 6.4L/6.7L V8 diesel. Weight-optimized stainless steel, mandrel-bent 4in piping, muffler-delete configuration, dual 5in polished tips positioned behind the passenger rear tire.

MagnaFlow 2021-2026 Ford Bronco 2.7L Overland Series Cat-Back Performance Exhaust System. High-clearance side-exit design engineered from 3D scans for improved departure angles. 3in mandrel-bent main piping, front tuned chamber + rear straight-through muffler with NDT resonator, single high-clearance side exit.

MagnaFlow 2021-2026 Ford Bronco 2.3L Overland Series Cat-Back Performance Exhaust System. 3in main piping to a straight-through muffler terminating in a single high-clearance side exit for improved ground clearance and departure angle; tunable NDT resonator eliminates drone at cruise.

MagnaFlow 2021-2026 Ford Bronco 2.7L / 2.3L Rock Crawler Series Cat-Back Performance Exhaust System. Weight-optimized, dyno-tested, corrosion-resistant stainless steel, 3in main piping, single straight-through muffler, single driver-side rear exit, 4in black chrome tip.

MagnaFlow 2022-2026 Ford Bronco Raptor 3.0L Overland Series Cat-Back Performance Exhaust System. High-clearance tucked 3in mandrel-bent main piping, two 11in round mufflers with NDT resonators, integrated active exhaust valves cast in 304 stainless steel, dual same-side driver-side rear exit.

Fast-flowing, mandrel bent 4in main piping with 2 straight-through mufflers, ending in a single passenger side rear exit with a 5in polished, welded-on, double-wall, angle-cut, rolled-edge tip. Fits 2011-2019 Chevrolet Silverado 2500HD/3500HD and GMC Sierra 2500HD/3500HD with the 6.0L gas V8.

Fast-flowing, mandrel bent 3.5in main piping with 1 straight-through muffler, ending in a dual split rear exit with 4in polished, clamp-on, double-wall, angle-cut, rolled-edge tips. Fits 2011-2019 Chevrolet Silverado 2500HD/3500HD and GMC Sierra 2500HD/3500HD with the 6.0L gas V8.

Mandrel bent 3.5in main piping with 1 straight-through muffler (22in) and a dual split rear exit with 4in black-coated tips. Corrosion-resistant stainless steel construction. Fits 2011-2019 Chevrolet Silverado 2500HD/3500HD and GMC Sierra 2500HD/3500HD with the 6.0L gas V8.

Fast-flowing, mandrel bent 4in main piping with 2 straight-through mufflers, ending in a single passenger side rear exit with a 5in polished tip. Fits 2020-2026 Chevrolet Silverado 2500HD/3500HD and GMC Sierra 2500HD/3500HD with the 6.6L diesel V8.

Mandrel bent 3in main piping with a straight-through muffler and NDT resonator, ending in a no-tip, high-clearance single passenger side rear exit for improved ground clearance and departure angle. Fits 2015-2022 Chevrolet Colorado and GMC Canyon with the 3.6L V6.

Mandrel bent 3in main piping with dual mufflers and NDT, ending in a no-tip, high-clearance single passenger side rear exit engineered for off-road terrain clearance. Fits 2023-2026 Chevrolet Colorado and GMC Canyon with the 2.7L L4.

Mandrel bent 3in main piping with 1 straight-through muffler, ending in a single passenger side rear exit with a 4in polished, welded-on, double-wall, angle-cut, rolled-edge tip. Direct-fit design via 3D scanning. Fits 2023-2026 Chevrolet Colorado and GMC Canyon with the 2.7L L4.

Mandrel bent 3in main piping with 1 straight-through muffler, ending in a dual split rear exit with 3.5in polished, angle-cut, rolled-edge, double-wall tips. CNC precision robotic manufacturing. Fits 2023-2026 Chevrolet Colorado and GMC Canyon with the 2.7L L4.

Single straight-through muffler with 2.5in mandrel bent main piping and high clearance driver side rear exit; No Drone Technology reduces interior cabin noise at cruising speed while retaining engine character. Fits 2018-2025 Jeep Wrangler.

Weight-optimized, dyno-tested, corrosion resistant stainless design engineered to hug the undercarriage for improved ground clearance; 2.5in mandrel-bent piping through one straight-through muffler, turndown exit before rear axle with 3in satin clamp-on single-wall tip. Fits 2018-2025 Jeep Wrangler.

High clearance axle-back design with 2.5in diameter mandrel bent main piping and an 18in straight-through oval muffler; tucked tailpipe to the rear of the passenger side. Includes NDT for highway comfort. Fits 2018-2025 Jeep Wrangler.
Rubicon 392 6.4L HEMI V8 cat-back with mandrel-bent 3in main piping, straight-through muffler bodies, and dual high-clearance exits for improved departure angle during off-road use.

Wrangler 392 street series system with 3in main tubing through dual free-flowing straight-through mufflers and resonators, terminating in quad rear exits with 4in black chrome tips; NDT resonators for reasonable cabin noise at cruise.
2.0L turbo Wrangler cat-back with fast-flowing mandrel bent 2.5in main piping, two straight-through mufflers, dual split rear exit; 4in black coated welded-on double wall angle cut folded edge tips.
Axle-back system for 2.0L/3.6L Wrangler with 2.5in main piping, dual split rear exit, 4in black coated stainless tips; combines aggressive sound with additional ground clearance.

DPF-back (filter-back) system for the 3.0L EcoDiesel Wrangler; replaces stock exhaust from the diesel particulate filter rearward with 3in mandrel-bent main piping and a single straight passenger-side rear exit with 3.5in black coated double-wall tip.

Direct-fit Gladiator cat-back with 3in mandrel-bent stainless piping through an 18in straight-through oval muffler with tuned chamber, high-clearance tucked tailpipe on driver's side rear; includes NDT module and removable pipe cap for alternate tuning.

Gladiator street series cat-back replacing stock components from the catalytic converter rearward; mandrel-bent 3in main piping, one 24in straight-through muffler, dual split rear exit with 4in black coated double-wall angle-cut rolled-edge tips.

Off-road focused Gladiator cat-back; weight-optimized, corrosion-resistant stainless design with 2.5in diameter mandrel-bent piping through one 24in straight-through muffler, terminating in a tipless turndown exit for improved departure angle.

Cat-back system for 2019-2024 redesigned (DT) Ram 1500 5.7L V8. Mandrel-bent 3in main piping, 1 straight-through muffler, dual split rear exit with 5in black coated welded-on double-wall angle-cut rolled edge tips.

Cat-back system for 2019-2024 redesigned (DT) Ram 1500 5.7L V8. Mandrel-bent 3in main piping, 1 straight-through muffler, dual split rear exit with 5in polished welded-on double-wall angle-cut rolled edge tips.

Cat-back system covering 2009-2010 Dodge Ram 1500 and 2011-2024 Ram 1500 Classic (carryover leaf-spring/DS body) V8 5.7L. Mandrel-bent 3in main piping, dual split rear exit with 5in black coated tips. Explicitly listed as fitting 'Ram 1500 Classic' — distinct from the redesigned Ram 1500 (SKU 19430/19429) for the same nominal model years.
Cat-back system for 2021-2024 Ram 1500 TRX 6.2L V8. 3in mandrel-bent main piping through an NDT chamber, dual split rear exit with 5in black chrome tips, 2 mufflers.

Configurable cat-back system for 2021-2024 Ram 1500 TRX 6.2L V8. 3in mandrel-bent piping, dual 5in black powder-coated tips, 4 straight-through mufflers with 3 interchangeable modules for adjustable sound.
Cat-back system for 2019-2024 Ram 1500 3.6L V6. 3in mandrel-bent main piping, 1 straight-through muffler, single passenger-side-rear exit with 4in polished tip.
DPF-back system for 2020-2023 Ram 1500 3.0L EcoDiesel V6. 2.5in mandrel-bent main piping, dual split rear exit with two 5in polished welded-on tips.
DPF-back diesel system for 2019-2026 Ram 2500/3500 6.7L Cummins I6. 5in mandrel-bent main piping, single passenger-side-rear exit with 6in black-coated tip, muffler-delete design.
DPF-back diesel system for 2019-2026 Ram 2500/3500 6.7L Cummins I6. 5in mandrel-bent main piping, single passenger-side-rear exit with 6in polished tip, muffler-delete design.
Cat-back system for 2014-2026 Ram 2500/3500 6.4L V8 gas. 3.5in mandrel-bent main piping, dual 5in polished tips exiting same-side behind the passenger rear tire, 1 straight-through muffler.

MagnaFlow 2010-2013 Chevrolet Camaro SS 6.2L Competition Series Cat-Back Performance Exhaust System. Mandrel-bent 2.5in main piping, 1 straight-through muffler, dual split rear exit with 5in polished welded-on single-wall angle-cut rolled edge tips.

MagnaFlow 2013-2015 Chevrolet Camaro ZL1 6.2L Street Series Cat-Back Performance Exhaust System. Mandrel-bent 3in main piping, 2 straight-through mufflers, quad split rear exit with 4in polished welded-on double wall angle-cut folded edge tips.

MagnaFlow 2010-2015 Chevrolet Camaro 3.6L Street Series Cat-Back Performance Exhaust System. Mandrel-bent 2.5in main piping, 3 straight-through mufflers, dual split rear exit with 4in polished welded-on double wall angle-cut folded edge tips.

MagnaFlow 2010-2015 Chevrolet Camaro 3.6L Street Series Axle-Back Performance Exhaust System. Mandrel-bent 2.5in main piping, 2 straight-through mufflers, dual split rear exit with 4in polished welded-on double wall angle-cut folded edge tips.

MagnaFlow 2010-2013 Chevrolet Camaro SS 6.2L Street Series Axle-Back Performance Exhaust System. Mandrel-bent 2.5in main piping, 2 straight-through mufflers, dual split rear exit with 4in polished stainless tips.

MagnaFlow 2016-2024 Chevrolet Camaro SS 6.2L Competition Series Cat-Back Performance Exhaust System. Mandrel-bent 3in main piping, 2 straight-through mufflers, quad split rear exit with 4in polished welded-on double wall angle-cut folded edge tips, actuated valve included.

MagnaFlow 2016-2024 Chevrolet Camaro 3.6L Race Series Axle-Back Performance Exhaust System. Mandrel-bent 2.5in main piping, straight-pipe design (no muffler), dual split rear exit with 4.5in polished welded-on double wall angle-cut folded edge tips.

MagnaFlow 2016-2024 Chevrolet Camaro 3.6L Competition Series Axle-Back Performance Exhaust System. Mandrel-bent 2.5in main piping, 2 straight-through mufflers, dual split rear exit with 4.5in polished welded-on double wall angle-cut folded edge tips.

MagnaFlow 2016-2024 Chevrolet Camaro 6.2L Competition Series Axle-Back Performance Exhaust System (fits SS and ZL1). Mandrel-bent 3in main piping, 2 straight-through mufflers, quad split rear exit with 4in polished welded-on double wall angle-cut folded edge tips.

MagnaFlow 2016-2024 Chevrolet Camaro 6.2L Race Series Axle-Back Performance Exhaust System (fits SS and ZL1). Race-ready, lightweight, dyno-proven design, mandrel-bent 3in main piping, straight-pipe (no muffler), quad split rear exit with 4in polished welded-on double wall angle-cut tips.

MagnaFlow 2015-2023 Dodge Challenger Competition Series Cat-Back Performance Exhaust System, fits 5.7L, 6.2L (Hellcat), and 6.4L (Scat Pack) V8 engines. Mandrel-bent 3in main piping, 2 straight-through mufflers, quad split rear exit with 3.5in polished welded-on double wall angle-cut folded edge tips.

MagnaFlow 2017-2023 Dodge Challenger xMOD Series Cat-Back Performance Exhaust System, fits 5.7L, 6.2L (Hellcat), and 6.4L (Scat Pack) V8 engines with factory exhaust valve. Modular interchangeable muffler modules with v-band clamps, NDT, quad split rear exit, carbon fiber tips.

MagnaFlow 2015-2023 Dodge Challenger Race Series Axle-Back Performance Exhaust System, fits R/T (5.7L), Scat Pack (6.4L), and SRT 392/Hellcat (6.2L) engines. Race-ready, lightweight, straight-pipe design (no muffler), mandrel-bent 3in main piping, quad split rear exit with 3.5in polished welded-on double wall angle-cut folded edge tips.

MagnaFlow 2015-2023 Dodge Challenger 3.6L Competition Series Cat-Back Performance Exhaust System. Mandrel-bent 2.5in main piping, 2 straight-through mufflers, quad split rear exit with 3.5in polished welded-on double wall angle-cut folded edge tips.

MagnaFlow 2015-2023 Dodge Challenger 3.6L Race Series Axle-Back Performance Exhaust System. Race-ready, lightweight design, mandrel-bent 2.5in main piping, straight-pipe (no muffler), quad split rear exit with 3.5in polished welded-on double wall angle-cut tips.
